scope: Paid (Google Ads) visits only. US visitors. Internal/test visits excluded.
method: Based on PostHog session recordings for paid (Google Ads) visitors: each visit's start time, landing page, clicks, form activity and outcome. Anything unusual (such as an odd click pattern) is flagged for review and confirmed before being reported as an issue, rather than assumed.

posthog.filter: Paid Search channel, US, test visits excluded

reconciliation.note: Google Ads paid-click figures for June 17 were not yet available at capture time: the conversion dashboard's June 17 update ran unattended and carried all sources (including the Google Ads daily series) forward from June 15, so neither June 16 nor June 17 has a posted paid-click count yet. PostHog recorded 1 paid US visit on June 17 - a 6-second bounce that landed on the Madison residential roofing page on desktop from a Google ad, with no form typing. No form starts and no submissions. Paid-click coverage for June 17 will reconcile on a later run once Google Ads posts the day.

sessions.label: Visit 1
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a desktop computer, stayed about 6 seconds with no clicks or form typing, then left (a quick bounce).

insights.headline: 1 recorded paid visit on June 17, a quick bounce
insights.body: PostHog captured a single paid US visit on June 17, arriving from Google Ads to the Madison residential roofing page on a desktop computer. It was a 6-second bounce with no clicks and no form typing.

insights.headline: Google Ads click count for June 17 not yet posted
insights.body: The conversion dashboard's June 17 update ran unattended and carried the Google Ads daily series forward from June 15, so there is no posted paid-click figure for June 16 or June 17 yet. Paid-click coverage for both days will reconcile on a later run.

insights.headline: The visit landed on the Madison residential roofing page
insights.body: As on recent days, the recorded paid visit came from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page - this time on desktop rather than mobile - and left quickly without engaging.

insights.headline: No form activity and nothing flagged
insights.body: There were no form starts, submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 17, and no visit needed flagging for a closer look.

data_notes: Window: June 17, 2026 (US Central). The visit is dated by its exact start time in US Central time.
Scope: paid (Google Ads) visits only, US visitors, internal and test visits excluded.
Privacy: visitor names and emails are not shown. Visits are referenced by anonymous labels and recording links only.

Paid clicks for June 17: not yet available. The conversion dashboard's June 17 update ran unattended and carried the Google Ads daily series forward from June 15, so no June 16 or June 17 paid-click figure is posted yet; both will reconcile on a later run.
The single recorded visit browsed on desktop and left with no form typing; there were no form starts, submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 17.
Weekly totals (June 11-17): 22 paid clicks across June 11-15 (June 16-17 not yet posted), 17 recorded visits, 1 form start, 0 submissions.

week_summary.captureRate: 64% (June 11-15; June 16-17 paid clicks not yet posted)

headline_state: Paid visitor sessions for June 17 (US Central). 1 recorded paid visit - a 6-second bounce on the Madison residential roofing page on desktop, from a Google ad - with no form typing and 0 submissions. Nothing flagged for review. Google Ads paid-click count for June 17 was not yet posted (conversion dashboard carried it forward from June 15) and will reconcile on a later run.
